creator: dotzsoh-singapore
caption:
moments like this that’s when I wish time could stop ✨💃🌅🌄🎈✨ #cappadocia #türkiye 

📍 when 175 balloons take flight at #Göreme #lovevalley & chasing sunrise #hotairballoons 

📸 @serkankaratasphotographer was so experience & drove to the hot air balloon took off spot which changes daily due to wind directions & provided the beautiful dress in my small size for this magical shoot 

🎞️ @dotzsoh @dotzsoh2 @serkankaratasphotographer 
#dotzsoh #gocappadocia #gotürkiye #turkıshairlines

transcription.text: Me complace amarte, disfruto acariciarte y ponerte a mí. Es escalofriante tenerte de frente y hacerte sonreír. Daría cualquier cosa por tan primrosa.
